title: Bow The Heavens

sections.label: Intro
lines: Blessed be the hands that train for war,
The fingers that learn the sword,
A fortress rising, a sheltering shore,
My Redeemer through trials below.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: What is man that You take note,
The fleeting breath, the shifting ghost?
Like shadows cast on dawn's first light,
We fade, we flicker, and lose the fight.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Bend the heavens, Lord, come down,
Touch the mountains till they drown,
Scatter darkness, break the skies,
Hear our trembling, yearning cries.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Stretch Your hand from realms above,
Deliver me with endless love.
For fleeting life, Your strength I claim,
Forever I will sing Your name.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A song of praise I lift to You,
A harp of ten strings, pure and true.
Rescue from waters deep and wide,
Guide me, Savior, as my tide.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Bow the heavens, cast fire below,
Let the storm of mercy grow.
Raise the poor, lift the frail,
Your love eternal will never pale.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Stretch Your hand from realms above,
Deliver me with endless love.
For fleeting life, Your strength I claim,
Forever I will sing Your name.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Your hands hold the earth and skies,
I am Yours till the day I rise.
Forever anchored in Your grace,
The fleeting man meets endless space.

styleNote: Subtle Guitar Arpeggios · Emotional Crescendo Repeats · Ethereal Guitars Drift Away
